content.name: exec

arguments.command: node -e "const https=require('https'); const key=process.env.GHL_TOKEN||process.env.GHL_PRIVATE_INTEGRATION_TOKEN||''; const loc=process.env.GHL_LOCATION_ID||'TW8JsPW5NMnA3tfK2XLn'; if(!key){console.error('NO_GHL_TOKEN'); process.exit(2);} const req=(path)=>new Promise((res,rej)=>{const r=https.request({hostname:'services.leadconnectorhq.com',path,method:'GET',headers:{Authorization:'Bearer '+key,Version:'2021-07-28','Content-Type':'application/json'}},(resp)=>{let b='';resp.on('data',d=>b+=d);resp.on('end',()=>{try{res(JSON.parse(b));}catch{res({raw:b});}})});r.on('error',rej);r.end();}); (async()=>{const out=await req(`/contacts/?locationId=${loc}&tags=ebook-buyer&limit=100`); const contacts=out.contacts||[]; const now=Date.now(); const day5=[]; const day7=[]; for(const c of contacts){const fields=c.customFields||[]; const pd=(fields.find(f=>f.key==='ebook_purchase_date')||{}).value; if(!pd) continue; if((c.tags||[]).includes('course-buyer')) continue; const days=Math.floor((now-new Date(pd).getTime())/(24*60*60*1000)); let score=30; const tags=c.tags||[]; if(tags.includes('replied')) score+=30; if(tags.includes('clicked-link')) score+=20; if(tags.includes('opened-email')) score+=15; if(tags.includes('visited-sales-page')) score+=25; score=Math.min(score,100); const item={id:c.id,name:c.firstName||'',email:c.email||'',daysSincePurchase:days,engagementScore:score}; if(days===5) day5.push(item); if(days===7 && score>=50) day7.push(item);} console.log(JSON.stringify({totalEbookBuyers:contacts.length,day5Count:day5.length,day7ReadyCount:day7.length,day5,day7Ready:day7},null,2)); })().catch(e=>{console.error('ERR',e.message); process.exit(1);});"

content.partialJson: {"command":"node -e \"const https=require('https'); const key=process.env.GHL_TOKEN||process.env.GHL_PRIVATE_INTEGRATION_TOKEN||''; const loc=process.env.GHL_LOCATION_ID||'TW8JsPW5NMnA3tfK2XLn'; if(!key){console.error('NO_GHL_TOKEN'); process.exit(2);} const req=(path)=>new Promise((res,rej)=>{const r=https.request({hostname:'services.leadconnectorhq.com',path,method:'GET',headers:{Authorization:'Bearer '+key,Version:'2021-07-28','Content-Type':'application/json'}},(resp)=>{let b='';resp.on('data',d=>b+=d);resp.on('end',()=>{try{res(JSON.parse(b));}catch{res({raw:b});}})});r.on('error',rej);r.end();}); (async()=>{const out=await req(`/contacts/?locationId=${loc}&tags=ebook-buyer&limit=100`); const contacts=out.contacts||[]; const now=Date.now(); const day5=[]; const day7=[]; for(const c of contacts){const fields=c.customFields||[]; const pd=(fields.find(f=>f.key==='ebook_purchase_date')||{}).value; if(!pd) continue; if((c.tags||[]).includes('course-buyer')) continue; const days=Math.floor((now-new Date(pd).getTime())/(24*60*60*1000)); let score=30; const tags=c.tags||[]; if(tags.includes('replied')) score+=30; if(tags.includes('clicked-link')) score+=20; if(tags.includes('opened-email')) score+=15; if(tags.includes('visited-sales-page')) score+=25; score=Math.min(score,100); const item={id:c.id,name:c.firstName||'',email:c.email||'',daysSincePurchase:days,engagementScore:score}; if(days===5) day5.push(item); if(days===7 && score>=50) day7.push(item);} console.log(JSON.stringify({totalEbookBuyers:contacts.length,day5Count:day5.length,day7ReadyCount:day7.length,day5,day7Ready:day7},null,2)); })().catch(e=>{console.error('ERR',e.message); process.exit(1);});\"","workdir":"C:\\Users\\JeremiahVanWagner\\.openclaw\\workspace-marketing","yieldMs":120000}
